Bash(ssh -p 22 root@ddd.com "for f in /www/wwwroot/tangyuanjizhang.zaixianapp.cn/uploads/2/2026-06-02/1780368029163149435_ocr.webp /www/wwwroot/tangyuanjizhang.zaixianapp.cn/uploads/2/2026-06-02/1780368748545226800_ocr.webp /www/wwwroot/tangyuanjizhang.zaixianapp.cn/uploads/2/2026-06-02/1780369002857938855_ocr.webp /www/wwwroot/tangyuanjizhang.zaixianapp.cn/uploads/2/2026-06-02/1780368594543221097_ocr.webp; do echo \\"=== \\$\(basename \\$f\) ===\\"; file \\$f; ls -lh \\$f; echo; done" 2>&1)

Bash(ssh -p 22 root@ddd.com "
DIR=/www/wwwroot/tangyuanjizhang.zaixianapp.cn/uploads/2/2026-06-02
TOTAL_BEFORE=0
TOTAL_AFTER=0
for f in \\$DIR/1780368029163149435_ocr.webp \\$DIR/1780368748545226800_ocr.webp \\$DIR/1780369002857938855_ocr.webp \\$DIR/1780368594543221097_ocr.webp; do
  SIZE_BEFORE=\\$\(stat -c%s \\"\\$f\\"\)
  TOTAL_BEFORE=\\$\(\(TOTAL_BEFORE + SIZE_BEFORE\)\)
  convert \\"\\$f\\" -quality 85 \\"\\$f\\"
  SIZE_AFTER=\\$\(stat -c%s \\"\\$f\\"\)
  TOTAL_AFTER=\\$\(\(TOTAL_AFTER + SIZE_AFTER\)\)
  echo \\"\\$\(basename \\$f\): \\$\(echo \\"scale=1; \\$SIZE_BEFORE/1048576\\" | bc\)MB -> \\$\(echo \\"scale=1; \\$SIZE_AFTER/1048576\\" | bc\)MB \(\\$\(file \\$f | grep -o 'RIFF.*'\)\)\\"
done
echo \\"\\"
echo \\"总计: \\$\(echo \\"scale=1; \\$TOTAL_BEFORE/1048576\\" | bc\)MB -> \\$\(echo \\"scale=1; \\$TOTAL_AFTER/1048576\\" | bc\)MB\\"
" 2>&1)

done
echo \\"\\"
echo \\"=== 加上之前处理的 ===\\"
echo \\"1780396953230556589_analyze.webp \\$\(ls -lh \\$DIR/1780396953230556589_analyze.webp | awk '{print \\$5}'\) \\$\(file \\$DIR/1780396953230556589_analyze.webp\)\\"
echo \\"\\"
find \\$DIR -type f \\\( -name '*.webp' -o -name '*.png' \\\) -size +1M -exec ls -lh {} \\; 2>/dev/null | sort -k5 -hr
" 2>&1)
